notes.type_correctness: test-writer.test.ts had 3 TypeScript errors from loose spy variable typing (ReturnType<typeof vi.spyOn>). Fixed by using explicit `any` with eslint-disable comments — same approach used in the pre-existing config.test.ts. The 3 pre-existing errors in config.test.ts are not regressions from this change.
notes.pattern_adherence: All new files follow kebab-case naming. TestWizard closely mirrors ImplementWizard: same Dialog structure, same state machine (submitting/queued/error), same handleClose/handleOpenChange pattern. YAML frontmatter phases follow exact same indentation as other commands.
notes.test_coverage: Bash tests cover template existence, all 3 phases, agent reference, placeholder-free assertions, and installed-copy identity check. Vitest tests cover discovery, parsing, phases array, edge cases (missing frontmatter, empty dir, malformed content). Missing: no tests for TestWizard or TestRunnerWidget React components (no frontend test setup exists in specrails-manager).
notes.security: No new attack surface. TestWizard POSTs to /spawn with command string — same pattern as ImplementWizard. No user input is executed server-side without sanitization. No secrets or tokens in any new file.
notes.architectural_alignment: sr-test-writer is correctly positioned as Phase 3c in the pipeline (after sr-developer, before sr-reviewer). The /specrails:test command correctly uses git diff HEAD as the default file discovery mechanism. TestRunnerWidget is properly isolated to jobs filtering on /specrails:test. Tests section in DashboardPage is correctly placed between Commands and Recent Jobs as specified.
